title: Doff 1L Rose Feed
features: Specially blended feed for roses & flowering plants
Helps maintain healthy growth and enhances the flower’s colour
description: Product Description Doff Rose Feed is a specially formulated concentrate for roses and other flowering plants. This quality fast acting feed with added magnesium and seaweed makes up to 300 litres of solution which will help maintain healthy growth and enhanced colour of roses and other flowers. Ingredients Nitrogen, Phosphorus, Potassium Directions Dilute 1 part Rose Feed to 20 parts water Safety Warning General: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and open flames. Always follow local regulations for disposal of chemical containers. Box Contains 1 x Doff Rose Feed, 1 Litre See more
